title: Table UDF: cannot mix range variables and scalar variables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table1(A INT, B INT, C FLOAT, D VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO table1(A, B, C, D) VALUES (1, 2, 3.5, 'test1'), (2, NULL, 4.5, 'test2'), (3, 4, NULL, 'test3');
SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE B IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A;
SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE C IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A;
SELECT * FROM table1, (SELECT MAX(B) AS max_b FROM table1 WHERE B IS NOT NULL) AS max_table WHERE table1.A IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Mixing range and scalar variables in UDF
